title: AWeber vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and Loops comes down to your specific use case. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Loops?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
